nasb.text: Festus *said, “King Agrippa, and all you gentlemen here present with us, you see this man about whom all the people of the Jews appealed to me, both at Jerusalem and here, loudly declaring that he ought not to live any longer.

esv.text: And Festus said, “King Agrippa and all who are present with us, you see this man about whom the whole Jewish people petitioned me, both in Jerusalem and here, shouting that he ought not to live any longer.

cnv.text: 非斯都說：“亞基帕王和在座的各位，請看這個人。耶路撒冷和本地的猶太人都向我請求，嚷著說這個人不該活著。

ccb.text: 说：“亚基帕王和在座的各位，你们看，就是这个人，所有的犹太人在这里和耶路撒冷都请求我处死他。

csbs.text: 菲斯特斯说：“阿格里帕王和所有在场的各位，你们所看见的这个人，犹太的全体民众为了他，在耶路撒冷和这里向我陈情，喊着说他不应该再活下去。
